competitors.name: Snyk
strengths: Strong developer experience and IDE integration
weaknesses: No knowledge graph or attack path analysis
competitors.differentiators: ALdeci ingests Snyk output AND runs 8 native scanners. 10 AutoFix types vs 2. MPTE exploit verification proves what Snyk only detects. Full air-gapped operation.

competitors.name: Wiz (Google-acquired, closing March 2026)
competitors.differentiators: ALdeci normalizes Wiz cloud findings AND adds MPTE active verification, AutoFix code patches, and signed evidence. Works air-gapped where Wiz cannot.

competitors.name: Semgrep
strengths: Fast, lightweight SAST with custom rules
weaknesses: SAST only — no DAST, container, secrets, CSPM
competitors.differentiators: ALdeci has its own SAST plus 7 more scanner types. Ingests Semgrep output for enrichment. Adds MPTE verification, Brain Pipeline correlation, 10 AutoFix types.

competitors.name: Vulcan Cyber
weaknesses: No MCP gateway for AI agents
competitors.differentiators: ALdeci has 8 native scanners (Vulcan has 0), MPTE verification, AI consensus, AutoFix code patches, and MCP gateway. We can scan without any external tool.

competitors.name: ArmorCode
weaknesses: No knowledge graph with attack paths
competitors.differentiators: Same parser coverage but with Brain Pipeline + AI-powered decisions. ALdeci scans, verifies, fixes, and proves — ArmorCode only aggregates and prioritizes.

competitors.name: Seemplicity
competitors.differentiators: ALdeci does everything Seemplicity does for remediation tracking, PLUS native scanning, MPTE verification, AI code fixes, and compliance evidence signing.

competitors.name: Checkmarx
competitors.differentiators: ALdeci's Switzerland positioning — we work WITH Checkmarx, not against it. Ingest Checkmarx results, add MPTE verification, AI consensus, and AutoFix on top. No vendor lock-in.

competitors.name: DeepAudit
strengths: Sandbox PoC verification (49 real CVEs tested)
competitors.differentiators: Same sandbox PoC concept, but with 12-step pipeline, enterprise compliance, AutoFix, knowledge graph, and MCP gateway. DeepAudit verifies; ALdeci verifies + decides + fixes + proves.

competitors.name: Claude Code Security
strengths: Found vulnerabilities missed by all other tools
competitors.differentiators: Claude finds vulns better than anyone. ALdeci DECIDES what to do about them. Together = unstoppable. We ingest Claude output and add Brain Pipeline + MPTE + AutoFix + Evidence.
competitors.overlap: Vulnerability discovery — but Claude has no pipeline

topWinReason: Native scanning + MPTE verification + air-gapped deployment (no competitor has all three)
topLossReason: Brand recognition and established enterprise relationships (incumbents)

noCompetitorHas: MCP gateway with 100+ auto-discovered tools (verified live)
